programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Sofia Franklyn joins Weezy in finding out the world of stripping isn't run by the women that power the industry; Reagan informs Weezy of the stripper strike; Candace Cain teaches the girls how to interact with the pole.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Charlamagne tha God calls in to explain the challenges that still face Black queer creators in this industry; Weezy and Mandii B break down their rise to fame and how they make money while showing how wild it gets at their live shows.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Leader of the Free World
programme.desc: Explore Bob Dylan's transformative journey through music, from folk poet to cultural icon and his impact on generations; learning the timeless legacy of his lyrics, voice and ever-evolving artistry.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Lily agrees to go on a date with a handsome older man, but things turn sour when he gets high; Che is vacationing in Mexico and picks up a Norwegian hottie, but he gets caught by her husband and seized by the Mexican police.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: When Phelisha agrees to date a white co-worker, she's shocked to see him dressed up as 50 Cent; Cory scores with a MILF, but leaves a treasured family heirloom at her house and must retrieve it the only way he knows how -- in disguise.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: Shannen learns to play the harmonica; the best ribs of the South.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: The girls are pulled over; dirt track race.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when Crystal confronts Tootie; Freedia and Devon meet with potential artists for her label.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia tries to play peacemaker to Crystal and Tootie; the pressure is on Reid to raise funds for Hotel Freedia.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia plans a boxing retreat to get her team all on the same page; Freedia rewards Devon for doing a good job; Freedia performs with Cimafunk.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Team Freedia cleans up the site of Hotel Freedia; Freedia debuts her new gospel song during her Louisiana Philharmonic performance.

programme.title: Fatal Addiction: Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Family, friends and fellow musicians describe the life of the child prodigy turned king of pop Michael Jackson over his four-decade career, from his rise to fame to his later battle with tabloids.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Chase the Truth
programme.desc: Close friends, former staff and researchers paint an intimate portrait of pop star Michael Jackson's complicated world and put allegations of sexual abuse under the microscope.

programme.desc: Career-driven investment banker Elle has given up on love until she meets Wesley, who invites her to his hometown in South Carolina, where she rediscovers the spirit of Christmas.

programme.desc: As a family prepares for a final Christmas together in their family home, Michelle works to redefine her relationships with her father and siblings.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Steph's guy from Tinder has a dungeon-like abode; Tara recounts her date with a pop star; Ariel turns to dating to distract himself from the passing of a close friend.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Laura offers to walk a man's dog and uses the opportunity to snoop through his house; Jordan goes out with a love interest but he blacks out from heavy drinking, leaving him to put the pieces back together of what happened the night before.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: One of the prettiest inns in town; Savannah's ghostly history.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: Home to white sand beaches, nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia plans a boxing retreat to get her team all on the same page; Freedia rewards Devon for doing a good job; Freedia performs with Cimafunk.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Team Freedia cleans up the site of Hotel Freedia; Freedia debuts her new gospel song during her Louisiana Philharmonic performance.

programme.title: Freedia Got a Gun
programme.desc: Devastated after learning her brother Adam was murdered, New Orleans bounce legend Big Freedia uses her platform to raise awareness about the complexities of gun violence, a nationwide epidemic that disproportionally harm Black communities.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Righteous Thieves
programme.desc: Annabel, the leader of a secret organization engaged in the recovery of priceless artwork, assembles a ragtag crew of art thieves to recover a Monet, Picasso, Degas and Van Gogh stolen by Nazis during WWII.

programme.desc: A dive into the murders committed by the Manson Family in July and August of 1969, including the brutal killing of Sharon Tate.

programme.title: Our Transgender Love Story
programme.desc: "Next Top Model" host Joey Mead King is no stranger to the media, but her life was changed forever when her husband went public as transgender.
